name: Chipotle Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat tortillas and keep soft. Nuke or steam.
2. Bring water to boil, add lemon juice, peppercorns, salt, and cook for 2 minutes.
3. Add shrimp, cook until pink and done, drain cool and peel.
4. Prepare chipotle butter: Puree together butter, 6 shrimp, and 1½ tablespoons chipotle puree; set aside at room temperature.
5. Just before serving, toss remaining shrimp with the rest of the chipotle puree and heat in a skillet.
6. Arrange three tortillas on a plate, add 8 shrimp, top with butter, sprinkle with green onions, and serve with Ranchero Sauce. Garnish each plate with avocado slices.
